concepts.headline: $4.2 billion in AI infrastructure, Q1 2025 alone.
concepts.subtext: More than all of 2022 combined. The picks and shovels are where the next decade of platforms will emerge.
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored hero layout on a #faf9f6 warm off-white canvas (1200x630px). The hero stat '$4.2B' rendered in DM Mono at 88px weight 700, color #111, anchored left at 72px from left edge, vertically centered slightly above midline. Below it, a 2px warm sand accent bar (#d7c8af) at 48px wide fading right to transparent. Headline label 'Q1 2025 AI infrastructure investment.' in Inter 22px weight 600 at #111 sits below the accent bar with 28px gap. Subtext in Inter 17px weight 400 at #555 sits 24px below headline, max-width 480px. A DM Mono eyebrow label 'VENTURE CAPITAL' in 11px uppercase letter-spacing 0.08em at #888 sits 16px above the stat. Right half of canvas (600px to 1128px) holds a particle dot network: scattered circles 2-6px at 0.08 opacity #6b7a7c, connected by 0.5px hairline strokes, concentrated toward right edge, fading toward center. Flywheel wordmark bottom-left in Inter 11px uppercase #888. 72px padding all edges.
concepts.color_usage: Background #faf9f6, hero stat #111, subtext #555, eyebrow #888, accent bar #d7c8af, particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.08 opacity, brand mark #888
concepts.reasoning: A single hero statistic is the dominant signal in this post. The $4.2B figure is striking and self-contained, making stat_callout the natural choice. The particle network on the right evokes infrastructure connectivity without being illustrative.

concepts.headline: The infrastructure layer is where money flows.
concepts.subtext: $4.2 billion invested in AI infrastructure in Q1 2025 alone. More than all of 2022 combined.
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored layout on #ffffff canvas. Top-left eyebrow label 'AI INFRASTRUCTURE · Q1 2025' in DM Mono 11px uppercase #888, 72px from left and top edges. 32px below, the headline in Inter 52px weight 600 letter-spacing -0.03em color #111, max-width 620px, two lines, left-aligned. A 2px horizontal accent bar in #d7c8af, 56px wide, sits 28px below the headline, flush left. Subtext in Inter 18px weight 400 #555 appears 24px below the bar, max-width 520px. Below subtext at 36px gap, four items arranged in a 2x2 tight grid: each item is a square tile 180px wide with a 1px #e5e5e5 border, 16px internal padding, item label in DM Mono 13px #333. Right side of canvas from 700px onward is entirely empty warm off-white with a faint FLYWHEEL watermark at 0.03 opacity, 140px bold uppercase. Flywheel brand mark bottom-left 11px uppercase #888. 72px edge padding.
concepts.color_usage: Background #ffffff, headline #111, subtext #555, eyebrow #888, accent bar #d7c8af, tile borders #e5e5e5, tile text #333, watermark #111 at 0.03 opacity
concepts.reasoning: The post argues a directional thesis supported by a concrete stat. Headline plus subtext with a small supporting grid of named infrastructure categories mirrors the post structure without over-engineering the visual.

concepts.headline: Follow the infrastructure money.
concepts.subtext: $4.2 billion flowed into AI infrastructure in Q1 2025 alone. The next decade of platform companies is being built here.
concepts.layout_description: Centered statement layout on #faf9f6 canvas. Canvas is 1200x630px. The headline 'Follow the infrastructure money.' is set in Inter 58px weight 600 letter-spacing -0.04em color #111, centered horizontally, positioned at vertical midpoint minus 40px. A 2px warm sand accent bar (#d7c8af) 64px wide is centered 20px above the headline, fading to transparent on both ends. Subtext in Inter 18px weight 400 #555 is centered 28px below the headline, max-width 560px. A faint FLYWHEEL watermark at 0.03 opacity sits behind the headline, 150px bold uppercase centered. Particle dot clusters appear in both lower corners: 8-12 dots each, 3-6px, at 0.07 opacity #6b7a7c, with 0.5px hairline connectors. Flywheel brand mark bottom-left corner in DM Mono 11px uppercase #888. 72px edge padding on all sides.
concepts.color_usage: Background #faf9f6, headline #111, subtext #555, accent bar #d7c8af, watermark #111 at 0.03 opacity, particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.07 opacity, brand mark #888
concepts.reasoning: The post ends with a clear call to action and investment thesis. Distilling it to a single bold directive creates maximum editorial impact and embodies Flywheel's philosophy of communicating through reduction.

selection_reasoning: The stat_callout concept most faithfully honors the post's core signal: a single extraordinary number ($4.2B) that reframes the entire AI investment narrative. Flywheel's aesthetic thrives on singular, dominant focal elements with generous negative space. The DM Mono hero stat paired with the particle network creates authoritative editorial tension without resorting to lists or declarations. It communicates the thesis instantly and at a glance, which is the primary job of a LinkedIn graphic.
